pattern_label: キャラクター＋Coco（全員参加）
pattern_description: キャラクター＋Coco（全員参加）
desc_ja: 梅雨の朝も、父の日も、Cocoとしずく・しらたま・ひよりが一緒。雨粒みたいに柔らかな水彩タッチで、大切な人への「ありがとう」「大好き」「おはよう」を24種。毎日使える温かいひとことを届けます。
desc_en: Even on rainy days, Coco and three little friends are by your side. 24 soft watercolor stamps — warm greetings, quiet gratitude, gentle encouragement — for the people who matter most this rainy season and beyond.

stamps.scene: 梅雨の朝、窓辺で温かく迎える
stamps.send_psychology: 一日の始まりに温かく迎える
stamps.outfit: 普段着（ダスティローズのリネントップ＋アイボリーワイドパンツ）
stamps.color_scheme: ペールゴールド・ソフトホワイト・ラベンダーミスト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Morning light palette — pale gold, soft white, lavender mist. Hydrangea blooms peeking at window corner.
[Character] Coco (41-year-old woman, bob hair, cool beauty expression, calm confident smile, casual daily wear — soft linen top in dusty rose, relaxed wide-leg pants in ivory), standing front view with arms slightly open in welcoming gesture. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, bright round eyes, one paw raised cheerfully). Shizuku (small turtle, shell with tiny flower ornaments, looking up with gentle gaze). Hiyori (small white bird, wings slightly spread, perched nearby). All four together in cozy morning scene, sparkling warm eyes across all characters, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おはよう』naturally placed at top center, warm honey-colored lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 父の日のプレゼントを渡す場面

stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Warm amber-rose palette, soft golden afternoon light, small wrapped gift with ribbon as accent prop.
[Character] Coco (41-year-old woman, bob hair, feminine beauty expression, gentle warm smile, going-out dress — deep navy blue midi dress with soft fabric, small pearl earrings), 3/4 angle view, holding small gift box with both hands. Hiyori (small white bird, holding a tiny ribbon in beak, bright hopeful eyes), perched on Coco's shoulder. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『いつもありがとう』naturally placed at bottom with warm space above, soft amber lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, eyes half-closed in content happiness, nuzzling against Coco's arm). Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
